subject.title: Support full list of accepted file types for OpenAI file inputs
subject.body:
### Description

If I'm [reading this code right](https://github.com/vercel/ai/blob/main/packages/openai-compatible/src/chat/convert-to-openai-compatible-chat-messages.ts#L60), this adapter will accept `part.mediaType` `image/`, `audio/`, and `application/pdf` as `type: 'image_url'`, `type: 'input_audio'`, and type `type: 'file'` respectively.

But `text/` will get stringified and collapsed down into a `type: 'text'` message. Other types (i.e. spreadsheets with `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet`) will throw `UnsupportedFunctionalityError`.

That seems like a real limitation given that Open AI [treats spreadsheet files differently](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/file-inputs/#full-list-of-accepted-file-types):

> Spreadsheet files (for example, .xlsx, .csv, .tsv): the API runs a spreadsheet-specific augmentation flow (described below).

Is there a reason why this doesn't support [the full list of accepted file types from OpenAI](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/file-inputs/#full-list-of-accepted-file-types)? Or am I missing something, here? 🤔 

Thanks!

### AI SDK Version

- ai: 6.0.112
- @ai-sdk/openai: 3.0.39

### Code of Conduct

- [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct

message: remove documentation and add support. update your config accordingly.
